news.title:
RBL Bank held investor meets on March 9, 2026, with no UPSI shared.
Meet details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
RBL Bank held investor meets on March 9, 2026, with no UPSI shared.
Meet details hosted on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees 10.7% rise in open interest despite weak price action.
Declining prices and volume hint at market positioning shifts among traders.
news.summary:
RBL Bank sees 10.7% rise in open interest despite weak price action.
Declining prices and volume hint at market positioning shifts among traders.

news.title:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.
news.summary:
Mutual funds increased stakes in banks as Nifty Bank Index gained 24% in a year.
Significant stake rises seen in AU SFB, Equitas SFB, RBL Bank, IDFC First Bank, and Federal Bank.

news.title:
RBL Bank shares rose 2% after RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to increase its stake to 9.99%, up from 1.88%.
RBL posted 12% YoY deposit growth, 548% YoY net profit rise in Q3FY26, but provisions increased 28% QoQ, impacting profitability.
news.summary:
RBL Bank shares rose 2% after RBI approved SBI Mutual Fund to increase its stake to 9.99%, up from 1.88%.
RBL posted 12% YoY deposit growth, 548% YoY net profit rise in Q3FY26, but provisions increased 28% QoQ, impacting profitability.

news.title:
RBI allows SBI Mutual Fund to hold up to 9.99% in RBL Bank for 1 year.
Current holding is 1.88%. Holdings above 5% will need new RBI approval.
news.summary:
RBI allows SBI Mutual Fund to hold up to 9.99% in RBL Bank for 1 year.
Current holding is 1.88%. Holdings above 5% will need new RBI approval.

news.title:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval to reappoint Mr. Chandan Sinha as Non-Executive Chairman for a second term from May 2026 to May 2029.
Mr. Sinha, a former RBI Executive Director, holds 40+ years of experience in banking and financial services.
news.summary:
RBL Bank secures RBI approval to reappoint Mr. Chandan Sinha as Non-Executive Chairman for a second term from May 2026 to May 2029.
Mr. Sinha, a former RBI Executive Director, holds 40+ years of experience in banking and financial services.

news.title:
India's M&A market is evolving with billion-dollar deals becoming frequent.
This marks a mature phase in the corporate landscape with high-value transactions.
news.summary:
India's M&A market is evolving with billion-dollar deals becoming frequent.
This marks a mature phase in the corporate landscape with high-value transactions.

news.title:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.
news.summary:
PSBs surpass private banks as quarterly profits reach new highs.
Only 3 of 30 listed universal banks had >1% net NPAs in Q3.

news.title:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.
news.summary:
NSE imposes an additional 15% margin on 18 stocks in March series to curb concentration risk.
Stocks include Vodafone Idea, RBL Bank, NBCC, Aditya Birla Capital, DLF, and others. ASM framework stocks also impacted.

news.title:
RBL Bank held an investor meet on Feb 12, 2026, in Mumbai with MKVentures Capital.
No UPSI was shared; details are available on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI norms.
news.summary:
RBL Bank held an investor meet on Feb 12, 2026, in Mumbai with MKVentures Capital.
No UPSI was shared; details are available on RBL Bank's website as per SEBI norms.

news.title:
RBI approved ICICI Prudential AMC and ICICI Bank to hold up to 9.95% in RBL Bank.
Current holding is 1.14% as of Feb 6, 2026; approval valid for one year with conditions.
news.summary:
RBI approved ICICI Prudential AMC and ICICI Bank to hold up to 9.95% in RBL Bank.
Current holding is 1.14% as of Feb 6, 2026; approval valid for one year with conditions.

news.title:
Emirates NBD to acquire 415.6M RBL Bank shares at ₹280 each, 26% stake.
Total offer value is approx ₹116.4B; regulatory approvals include surrendering broker license.
news.summary:
Emirates NBD to acquire 415.6M RBL Bank shares at ₹280 each, 26% stake.
Total offer value is approx ₹116.4B; regulatory approvals include surrendering broker license.

news.title:
RBL Bank held an investor meet on Jan 28, 2026, with Goldman Sachs Asset Management in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; details are on the bank's website.
news.summary:
RBL Bank held an investor meet on Jan 28, 2026, with Goldman Sachs Asset Management in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive information was shared; details are on the bank's website.

news.title:
RBL Bank reports a 10.6% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
The stock shows modest price recovery and outperforms its sector, highlighting shifting investor positions.
news.summary:
RBL Bank reports a 10.6% rise in open interest, indicating increased market activity.
The stock shows modest price recovery and outperforms its sector, highlighting shifting investor positions.

news.title:
Rupee has depreciated 7.1% against the dollar in FY26 so far.
BS Poll predicts rupee to trade around 92.5 per dollar by March-end.
news.summary:
Rupee has depreciated 7.1% against the dollar in FY26 so far.
BS Poll predicts rupee to trade around 92.5 per dollar by March-end.

news.title:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.
news.summary:
Corporate credit demand rebounds in Q3, with 13 banks reporting 10.6% YoY growth in lending, up from 8% in Q2.
PSU and mid-sized banks saw sharper growth; Central Bank of India led with 23.2% YoY growth, followed by RBL at 16.5%.

news.title:
RBL Bank shared the transcript of its January 17, 2026, earnings call with analysts and investors on its website.
This complies with SEBI Listing Regulations, and the details are hosted on the bank's official site for reference.
news.summary:

news.title:
CCI approves Emirates NBD Bank's stake purchase in RBL Bank.
The move hints at potential growth opportunities for RBL Bank.

news.title:
RBL Bank sees a 35.7% surge in derivatives open interest, indicating active market positioning.
The stock fell 6.8%, underperforming its sector and broader indices amid complex market sentiment.
